summary: Iteration 53: Tested Move Back (Change Stage) and Raise Ticket features in School CRM. Both features are fully functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Move Back and Raise Ticket features are fully implemented. Move Back button appears on meeting_done, converted, active, renewal_meeting, and renewed stages with appropriate rollback options. Raise Ticket button appears on ALL stages including new, meeting_done, converted, active, renewal_meeting, renewed, lost/lost_lead/lost_customer, and archived.

move_back_button_visibility.renewed: FOUND - dropdown shows 'Active' and 'Renewal Meeting' options

raise_ticket_modal.query_type_dropdown: FOUND (Kit Delivery, Payment Query, Teacher Training, Technical Support, etc.)

features_verified: Move Back button visible on meeting_done stage with 'New Lead' rollback option
Move Back button visible on converted stage with 'Meeting Done' rollback option
Move Back button visible on active stage with 'Converted' rollback option
Move Back button visible on renewal_meeting stage with 'Active' rollback option
Move Back button visible on renewed stage with 'Active' and 'Renewal Meeting' rollback options
PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/{id} successfully changes status to previous stage
Status changes are logged in activity_log with timestamp and user info
Raise Ticket button visible on ALL stages (new, meeting_done, converted, active, renewal_meeting, renewed, lost, archived)
Raise Ticket modal opens with proper form fields
POST /api/schools/{id}/raise-ticket creates ticket in support_queries collection
Tickets raised from School CRM are visible in Support Center
